zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward de Salisbury III the Younger於從1118年到1120年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親Edward of Salisbury60歲，母親Matilda FitzHubert de Rie50歲。他和Adeliza Raimes至少有1個女兒。他去世於從1145年到1148年，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward de Salisbury III the Younger于从1118年到1120年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲Edward of Salisbury60岁，母亲Matilda FitzHubert de Rie50岁。他和Adeliza Raimes至少有1个女儿。他去世于从1145年到1148年，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Salisbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name primarily from Salesbury in Blackburn (Lancashire) but also occasionally from Salisbury (Wiltshire). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + burg ‘fortress’, while the Wiltshire placename arises from a shortened form of the Celtic placename Sorviodunum (from an unknown initial element + Celtic dūno- ‘fort’). In the Old English period the second element was dropped and Sorvio- (of unexplained etymology) became Searo- in Old English as the result of folk etymological association the Old English word searu ‘trick’; to this an explanatory burh ‘fortress, manor, town’ was added. The city is recorded in the Domesday Book as Sarisberie; the change of -r- to -l- is the result of later dissimilation.

variants.name: Salsbury
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of Salomon or some other Jewish name beginning with Sa-.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward de Salisbury III the Younger was born from 1118 to 1120, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Edward of Salisbury, was 60 and his mother, Matilda FitzHubert de Rie, was 50. He had at least 1 daughter with Adeliza Raimes. He died from 1145 to 1148, and was buried in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward de Salisbury III the Younger est né du 1118 au 1120, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward of Salisbury, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Matilda FitzHubert de Rie, avait 50 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Adeliza Raimes. Il est décédé du 1145 au 1148, et a été enterré à Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward de Salisbury III the Younger von 1118 bis 1120 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward of Salisbury 60 und seine Mutter Matilda FitzHubert de Rie 50. Er hatte mit Adeliza Raimes mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb von 1145 bis 1148 und wurde in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward de Salisbury III the Younger è nato il da 1118 a 1120 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Edward of Salisbury, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Matilda FitzHubert de Rie, aveva 50 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Adeliza Raimes. Morì da 1145 a 1148, e fu sepolto a Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward de Salisbury III the Youngerがから1118年まで1120年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Edward of Salisburyは60歳，母Matilda FitzHubert de Rieは50歳であった。彼はAdeliza Raimesとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼はから1145年まで1148年に死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラデンストクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward de Salisbury III the Younger(이)가 1118년 부터 1120년 까지 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward of Salisbury(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda FitzHubert de Rie(은)는 50세였다. 그는 Adeliza Raimes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1145년 부터 1148년 까지 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 브라덴스토크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward de Salisbury III the Younger nasceu de 1118 a 1120, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward of Salisbury, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Matilda FitzHubert de Rie, tinha 50 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Adeliza Raimes. Ele faleceu de 1145 a 1148, e foi sepultado em Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward de Salisbury III the Younger родился с 1118 по 1120 в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward of Salisbury было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda FitzHubert de Rie, 50. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Adeliza Raimes. Он умер с 1145 по 1148 и был похоронен в местности браденсток, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Adeliza Raimes. Murió desde 1145 hasta 1148, y fue sepultado en Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
